subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 14 (Tablet to the fourteenth Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Tá. Nún. The mention of thy Lord's exalted Countenance, Who proclaimed "Verily, I am the Truth!", hath been inscribed by God as a testimony unto all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله المتکبر العلی. ط‌ن ذکر طلعة ربک علیا نادی بأنی انا الحق قد کتب من عند الله حجة للعالمین جمیعا
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
